Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding
Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding
Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding
Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding
Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
3.26 ^xE05030Volcanic Fissure of Snaking^7 Berserker^7 ^xC8C8C8Primary Build Guide Sunder Campaign into Volcanic Fissure Endgame^7 Video Guide: https://youtu.be/khR0v6JMMJo
twitch.tv/PhazePlays youtube.com/@PhazePlays_
^x7070FF==================================^7^7^7 ^x8888FF********^7 POST-LAUNCH UPDATES ^x8888FF*********** ^x8888FF==================================^7 ^xD02090== Divine Shield & Corrupted Soul ---- Overleech & Immortal Amibition ==^7^7 Corrupted Soul + Divine Shield is usually more comfortable than Immortal Ambition with Echoes of Creation, specifically when there's nothing to leech from Overleech is definitely viable, but Divine Shield is easier to recommend to most players
The only real gearing difference is the Large Cluster are slightly different, as Feed the Fury isn't as great without overleech Large Cluster Jewels (likely worth using a 2H Cluster) Prefix notables: Required: 1x Fuel the Fight Others: Calamitous, Battlefield Dominator(2H), Titanic Swings(2H), Drive the Destruction(2H) Suffix notable: Any (Martial Prowess(preferred), Heavy Hitter, Smite the Weak)
Added an additional loadout for Divine Shield -- Still working on this PoB a bit
Regardless of your setup, always get as much Physical Damage Mitigation as possible while wearing Echoes of Creatiom Ways to counteract the self-hit damage: High Armour % Physical Damage Mitigation roll on Body Armour Divine your Echoes to 15% physical damage taken per warcry A mercenary with ^xE05030Determination^7 Recoup Flesh and Stone Invest into maximum leech rate (Hematophagy wheel) Instant leech mastery
^xD02090== Aspect of Carnage vs Defy Pain == ^7 Softcore: Aspect of Carnage -- unless you feel overwhelmingly squishy then possibly consider Defy Pain for a bit Hardcore: Defy Pain, with the option of swapping to Aspect of Carnage lategame if/when you feel tanky enough
^xD02090== Trinity ==^7 For anyone with issues getting Trinity to reliably proc: Check the Volcanic Fissure of Snaking tooltip damage range for both Fire and Cold, there should be some overlap The more these numbers overlap, the more likely Trinity will 'activate' on each hit
Double check that you don't have any Flat Fire to attacks on rings, amulet, gloves, weapon -- or Herald of Ash enabled Alternatively, having any Flat Cold on these pieces will improve Trinity uptime If you've checked all of these and still have issues, then get one of the following: The boot eldritch implicit "4% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage" (Eater) Annoint "Winter Spirit" (10% of Physical as Extra Cold) -- Sepia, Teal, Silver
Going Trinity is not really necessary unless you want the Chill+Freeze or are pairing it with Yoke of Suffering for more ailments
^xD02090== Kaom's Primacy ==^7 This weapon does a lot of damage but it's slow. Super slow It's not comfortable to map with Highly recommend mapping with a Rare weapon that has an attack speed roll If you want to, you can weapon swap to Kaom's Primacy for single target
^xD02090== Axe Base ==^7 Vaal Axe is the best overall weapon for managing exerts while still having comfortable attack speed
^xD02090== Mapping Filter (3.26) ==^7 https://www.pathofexile.com/account/view-profile/phazeplays-4855/item-filters MapEntry3.26
^xD02090== Common Issues ==^7 3.26 moved 'Aspect of the Carnage' on the Berserkers skill tree, which didn't properly translate when Path of Building converted skill trees from 3.25 to 3.26 The video build guide also had the old skill tree in it, which probably added to this confusion TLDR: Make sure you are specced into Berserker's ^xADAA47Aspect of Carnage^7 and NOT ^xADAA47Ancestral Fury^7
If a skill gem setup has more gems than sockets, gems that aren't ticked "Enabled" are alternative gem options
^x8888FF==================================^7^7 ^x8888FF***********^7 EARLY / PROGRESSION ^x8888FF********** ^x8888FF==================================^7 ^xD02090== Mercenary ==^7 Auras to look for: Determination / Haste The Merc also counts as an additional ally for Rallying Cry
^xD02090== Bandits ==^7 Leaguestart: Help Alira Otherwise: Kill all
^xD02090== Pantheons ==^7 Major: Brine King Minor: Ralakesh
^xD02090== Warcry Setup ==^7 ^xADAA47Autoexert^7: ^xE05030Intimidating Cry^7, ^xE05030Seismic Cry^7, ^xE05030Infernal Cry^7 ^xADAA47Manually Press^7: ^xE05030Battlemage's Cry^7, ^xE05030Rallying Cry^7 If pressing fewer buttons is important to you, drop Rallying Cry or only press it on Single Target Might be worth it to some players to autoexert more than 3 warcries. Enlighten may be useful, there's a lot of flexibility here
^xD02090== Endurance Charges ==^7 While mapping, the ^xADAA47100% increased charge duration^7 mastery should passively ensure 100% uptime On single target, you may need to occasionally press ^xE05030Enduring Cry^7 to sustain charges (depending on your DPS and what content you're doing) ^xE05030Enduring Cry ^7should only be used early-midgame during long boss fights to maintain Endurance Charges After getting ^xADAA47Gain an Endurance Charge every 15 seconds^7 implicit on your chest, ^xE05030Enduring Cry^7 becomes droppable Or if you like to live dangerously just skip Enduring Cry altogether
^x8888FF==================================^7^7 ^x8888FF******************^7 GAMEPLAY ^x8888FF********************^7 ^x8888FF==================================^7 ^xD02090== Volcanic Fissure of Snaking Mechanics ==^7 While mapping, fissures travel around to nearby enemies and erupt several times - essentially "chaining" like projectiles do - just more slowly
Volcanic Fissure of Snaking can hit a lone enemy 3 times typically Mousing over the enemy is 2 hits, while putting your cursor right outside of the enemy hitbox will usually lead to 3 hits The more AoE you have, the easier this is to achieve TLDR: ^xADAA47Don't mouseover the enemy^7, instead put your cursor slightly outside of the enemy hitbox
^xD02090== Mana Costs ==^7 Mana costs may be rough without -mana jewellery crafts ^xE05030Lifetap^7 is an option in your main links, and frees up ring crafts and some passive points Grabbing ^xADAA47Cannibalistic^7 on the tree or the ^xADAA47Skills costs life instead 15% of mana costs^7 mastery are also options Battlemage's Cry automatically triggers ^xE05030Punishment^7 - watch out for mana costs. Switch to a lower level ^xE05030Punishment^7 if needed
^xD02090== Mana Leech ==^7 Once you get to maps, Mana Leech is required Early on there are 4 options to get mana leech: Spend 5-6 points on the tree to go to the ^xADAA47Vitality Void^7 and ^xADAA47Spirit Void^7 wheel Link ^x70FF70Mana Leech Support^7 to an Autoexerted ^xE05030Infernal Cry^7 (costs 2 gem sockets, an extra Autoexertion and the Mana Leech gem itself -- maybe drop cwdt + molten shell) A ^x8888FFViridian jewel^7 with Physical Mana Leech roll (41 alteration avg) -- doesn't work with 100% elemental conversion, grab the ^xADAA47100% increased fire damage against ignited enemies^7 mastery instead of ^xADAA4740% physical to fire conversion^7 Annoint ^xADAA47Clever Thief^7 (clear, verdant, indigo)
Lategame, a Large Cluster jewel with ^xADAA47Fuel the Fight^7 solves mana leech ^xD02090 ^xD02090== Onslaught Uptime ==^7 Autoexerted warcries may need staggered gem quality so they de-sync for better Onslaught uptime from ^xADAA47Lead by Example^7 on a Medium Cluster Jewel ^xE05030 ^xD02090== Rage ==^7 Sustain permanent Rage with two masteries: ^xADAA47Warcries have a minimum of 10 power^7 and ^xADAA47Warcries grant 1 Rage per 5 Enemy Power, up to 5^7 ^xADAA47Warcries cannot Exert Travel Skills^7 is required no matter what, either from the Warcry Mastery or from a Bench Craft suffix on belt / rings / amulet (jewellery craft is ideal) ^xE05030Berserk^7 is a solid burst damage button, and while it's active you stop losing life from Rite of Ruin ^xE05030 ^xD02090== Trinity Swap ==^7 Probably not worth swapping to Trinity until you have ^xAF6025Yoke of Suffering^7 -- unless you just want the Chill/Freeze for safety Volcanic Fissure baseline has 60% Fire conversion Convert the final 40% to ^x3F6DB3Cold^7 (or ^xADAA47Lightning^7) with ^xFFFF77Gloves^7 (15% eldritch implicit + 25% cold conversion craft prefix) Unspec ^xADAA47Lava Lash^7 Swap ^xADAA47Divine Fury^7 to ^xADAA47Divine Judgement^7 Swap ^xE05030Herald of Ash^7 to ^xE05030Herald of Purity^7
^xD02090== Frenzy Charges while Bossing ==^7 1 or 2 ^xADAA47Mob Mentality^7 notables from a Medium Cluster Exert jewel can be used if you want to sustain Frenzy Charges while bossing
^x8888FF==================================^7 ^x8888FF******************^7 UNIQUES ^x8888FF******************** ^x8888FF==================================^7 ^xD02090== Kaom's Primacy ==^7 Solid early to midgame axe. Common enough drop that it shouldn't be super hard to get, might be expensive day 1/2 who knows
^xD02090== Yoke of Suffering ==^7 This amulet enables cold and fire damage to inflict shock as well, making large Shocks possible Ailments to aim for: Chill, Shock, Ignite, Bleed, Poison (and occasionally Freeze) give a sizeable 50% or 60% increased damage taken on enemies Re-craft gloves from 40% conversion to 39% conversion once you have Yoke, then get a source of bleed chance and poison chance: Bleed tattoo: Tattoo of the Kitava Shaman Poison chance jewel: Viridian or Crimson Consider running a flask with a "Chance to freeze/shock/ignite" suffix
^xD02090== Glorious Vanity == ^7 ^xADAA47Ahuana^7 variant Provides ^xADAA47Overleech^7 from the ^xADAA47Immortal Ambition^7 Keystone, which gives fantastic life sustain during all content, and easily offsets any degen from Rite of Ruin ^xADAA47Feed the Fury^7 and ^xADAA47Fuel the Fight^7 from Large Cluster Jewels synergize nicely here Pair this with a ^xAF6025Thread of Hope^7 (Massive) for even more synergy
^xD02090== Thread of Hope ==^7 Consider a Massive ^xAF6025Thread of Hope^7 in the outer Templar jewel socket Search for strong Glorious Vanity jewels that hit many of the notables in range
^xD02090== Redblade Banner ==^7 Optional offhand shield that allows you to quickly start maps or re-enter bosses with full endurance charges Weapon swap --> Enduring Cry --> Weapon Swap Put ^xE05030Enduring Cry^7 in an offhand socket
^x8888FF==================================^7 ^x8888FF**************^7 GEAR / CRAFTING ^x8888FF**************^7 ^x8888FF==================================^7 ^xD02090== Prismatic Tincture ==^7 Required Suffix (i85 for T1): Melee Weapon Damage Penetrates #% Elemental Resistances
Strong Prefixes: % increased Effect (i85 for T1) % increased effect, % increased Mana Burn rate (i84 for T1) % increased Cooldown Recovery Rate (i82 for T1)
Don't forget to 20% quality when able
^xD02090== Jewels ==^7 Here's a basic template jewel search, maybe tailor it to your needs: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Mercenaries/vBrX03ZuE
^xD02090== Large Cluster Jewels ==^7 Craft using "Harvest Reforge Attack" usually (75 purple juice) Cluster ease to roll: Axe&Sword > 2H > Attack iLevel 50-67 are easier to roll, can get any i50-67 cluster and repeatedly do 5-to-1 vendor recipe to fish for good clusters Aim for ^xADAA47Feed the Fury^7, ^xADAA47Fuel the Fight^7, and ^xADAA47Martial Prowess^7 but these are flexible, especially early league ^xADAA47Devastator^7 is an option if rich
^xD02090== Medium Cluster Jewel ==^7 i68+ Exerted Attacks medium cluster jewel Looking for both ^xADAA47Lead by Example^7 and ^xADAA47Warning Call^7 Craft with Alterations, Augments, Regals Average cost to hit both: 185 alts, 40 regals, 39 scours
^xD02090== Ailment Immunity ==^7 ^x3F6DB3Freeze^7: Bring King pantheon ^x3F6DB3Chill^7: boot craft - chill immunity / 20% movespeed ^xADAA47Shock^7: Earlygame: craft shock reduction on a ring and get a shock reduction flask suffix Lategame: use a high roll shock avoid abyss jewel and craft boots with Torment essences Suppression small clusters also have 20% ailment avoidance each Boot eldritch ailment avoidance implicits are also options ^xAF6025Stormshroud^7 is a lategame option for complete ailment immunity, but it's not necessary
^xD02090== Suppression ==^7 Suppression cap is recommended for comfortable Uber bossing, but it's not really necessary otherwise Suppression can be capped with two Suppression Small Cluster Jewels (3 passive, 25% increased passive effect + ^xADAA47Elegant Form^7 = 20% suppression per cluster jewel) Pathing to the ^xADAA47Entrench^7 wheel is also an option Suppression cap can be very tight, especially if using an ^xAF6025Echoes of Creation^7 helmet
^xD02090== Body Armour == ^7 ^xADAA47Royal Plate^7 is also a fantastic endgame Body Armour base if you can cap suppression with just a 10% craft It's better at mitigating ^xAF6025Echoes of Creation^7 self-hit damage than a ^xADAA47Conquest Lamellar^7 is
^xD02090== Impact Force Propagator ==^7 2H Mace from Heist that gives 2 additional Exerted attacks, which gets doubled by Berserker's War Bringer. Can be a decent option in trade league - but it's harder to craft than a non-heist base Not quite as appealing as it used to be with Settlers weapon enchants gone
^xD02090== Annoint Options ==^7 Berserking (6% attack speed, +5 max rage) Clever Thief (1% mana leech / 1% life leech) Forces of Nature (10% ele penetration with attacks) Wrecking Ball (25% increased dmg, 10% attack speed, 40% increased stun duration) Inveterate (+15% suppress, prevent +3% of suppressed damage) Tenacity (5% increased max life, transfiguration of body)

Skill.label: Blood Rage (jade amulet, stop leveling it early)
Lvl 18: Add Close Combat & Melee Phys

Rarity: RARE Midgame Leviathan Greaves Armour: 496 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.637}IncreasedLife7 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.648}LightningResist5 Suffix: {range:0.451}ColdResist5 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {exarch}4% increased Action Speed {tags:physical_damage,elemental_damage,damage,physical,elemental,cold}{eater}Gain 4% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage +109 to maximum Life +32% to Cold Resistance +33% to Lightning Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,cold,speed,ailment}{crafted}{range:0.915}(18-20)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,cold,speed,ailment}{crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled

Rarity: RARE Endgame Wyvernscale Boots Armour: 283 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 283 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.905}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.842}ChanceToSuppressSpells5__ Suffix: {range:0.62}LightningResist7 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {exarch}6% increased Action Speed {tags:physical_damage,elemental_damage,damage,physical,elemental,cold}{eater}Gain 5% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +128 to maximum Life +44% to Lightning Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,cold,speed,ailment}{crafted}{range:1}(18-20)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,cold,speed,ailment}{crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled {tags:elemental,lightning,ailment}{custom}{range:0.5}(51-55)% chance to Avoid being Shocked
